name: Light Milk Cookie/Sage of Truth
description:
virtue! user

so the students at blueberry yogurt academy picked up a rumor that there was a sixth virtue out there.. and obviously this piques light milk cookie’s interest, being one himself and thinking it was just him and the other four.

idk where im going w this i merely thought it was a fun idea

ideas; you could lowkey just hide in plain sight in the academy or live in a land of your own that had been just there until rumors spread.. idk have fun :3

if youre a sekai fan IM ABOUT TO EXPLODE THIS FUCKING DOG RERUN IS KILLING ME please pray i get ANYONE. thanks! :3c

ENJOY!

tags; smc, shadow milk, shadow milk cookie, sage of truth, light milk cookie
